title: Bootstrap Wizard state machine
rawUserRequest: 完成 Bootstrap Adoption 评审整改执行计划，按计划逐项走完整 Work Item 闭环；当前工单实现 Bootstrap Wizard 状态机。

declaredIntent.summary: Implement a side-effect-free Bootstrap Wizard state machine with explicit review and resume transitions.

outOfScope: Installer integration and adoption evidence persistence (WI04)
Changing configured complexity limits or repayment policy (WI07)

sources.reason: Authoritative adoption lifecycle and phase boundary documentation.
Existing lifecycle-state and onboarding behavior evidence.
Existing transactional adoption boundary and runtime entrypoint.
Complexity metric implementation whose generated-status boundary is calibrated here.

riskAssessment.reason: A pure state machine controls review/confirmation sequencing but does not perform repository writes.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized execution of the full remediation plan; this Work Item is limited to a pure, testable state machine.

preReviewWarnings: Review that the state machine remains side-effect free and does not imply production readiness.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record before-edit and before-finish checkpoints for the first implementation Work Item.

acceptance: A repository-independent Session object can be created outside the target repository and records phase, revision, and proposal data.
The state machine supports Detect, Propose, Configure, Review, and Confirm, plus Back, Cancel, and Resume transitions.
Changing an upstream revision invalidates downstream proposal/configuration/review state and requires re-review before Confirm.
Unit tests cover legal transitions, rejected transitions, cancellation/resume, and upstream invalidation; adoption documentation names the state-machine boundary.
Generated .ai/cockpit/current_status.md is excluded from persistent Markdown complexity totals, with a regression test; configured limits are unchanged.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.
Preserve the distinction between adoption bootstrap, calibration, and governed development.

intent.problem: Bootstrap currently exposes transactional installation behavior but lacks an explicit, reusable state-machine model for an external session that can pause before any repository write.
constraints: Keep the session data outside the target repository and keep transitions side-effect free.
Do not claim that a confirmed bootstrap is project configuration or production readiness.
Use standard-library-only code consistent with the template runtime.
intent.rationale: An explicit state machine makes Back/Cancel/Resume and stale-upstream invalidation testable before later Work Items add detection, write boundaries, and adoption evidence.

problemStatement: Provide a pure Bootstrap Wizard state machine that sequences proposal review and confirmation without writing to the adopter repository.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Happy path Detect → Propose → Configure → Review → Confirm
Back, Cancel, and Resume preserve or safely reset external session state
Upstream revision drift invalidates downstream state
No repository write occurs in the state machine
Active generated status does not consume persistent Markdown budget

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized completing the full remediation plan, including governance documentation updates.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
